title: Decorative element with a heating function
abstract: The present invention relates to a decorative element with a heating function, which decorative element comprises a poster that is attached to a heating element, and wherein the decorative element can be rolled up. The present invention further relates to a method for producing such decorative element.
claims:
Claims I . Decorative element with a heating function, comprising a poster attached to a heating element, wherein the decorative element can be rolled up. 2. Decorative element as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the heating element comprises a base layer, a carbon or graphene layer, and optionally an intermediate layer. 3. Decorative element as claimed in claim 2, wherein the base layer, carbon or graphene layer, and intermediate layer are flexible layers. 4. Decorative element as claimed in claim 2 or 3, wherein the base layer and/or intermediate layer is a foil, and/or is made of plastic or one or more polymers. 5. Decorative element as claimed in any one of the claims 1-4, wherein the carbon or graphene layer is present in a pattern on the base film. 6. Decorative element as claimed in claim 5, wherein the pattern is selected from the group consisting of a pattern of stripes, a honeycomb pattern, a grid pattern, and a labyrinth pattern. 7. Decorative element as claimed in any one of the claims 2-6, wherein the carbon or graphene layer is in contact with electrodes. 8. Decorative element as claimed in any one of the claims 2-7, wherein the poster is attached to the intermediate layer of the heating element. 9. Decorative element as claimed in any one of the claims 1-8, further comprising a cover layer over the decoration side of the poster. 10. Decorative element as claimed in any one of the claims2-9, wherein the base layer, intermediate, and/or cover layer, is a heat pretreated cover layer. I I. Decorative element as claimed in any one of the claims 7-10, further comprising a power cord connected to the electrodes. 12. Method for providing a decorative element with a heating function, the method comprising: a) applying a layer of carbon or graphene on a base layer; b) heating the base layer comprising the carbon or graphene layer to harden the carbon or graphene; c) optionally applying an intermediate layer onto the carbon or graphene layer, thereby forming a heating element; and d) applying a poster to the carbon or graphene layer, or the intermediate layer, of the heating element; e) optionally applying at least one cover layer onto the illustration side of the poster, 

 thereby forming a decorative element with a heating function. 13. The method as claimed in claim 12, further comprising pretreating the base layer, intermediate layer, and/or cover layer with heat to reduce the stress from the layer. 14. Method as claimed in claim 12 or 13, wherein the base layer, carbon or graphene layer, and intermediate layer are flexible layers. 15. Method as claimed in any one of the claims 12-14, wherein the base layer and/or intermediate layer is a foil, and/ or is made of plastic or one or more polymers. 16. Method as claimed in any one of the claims 12-15, wherein the carbon or graphene paste is applied in a pattern on the base film. 17. Method as claimed in claim 16, wherein the pattern is selected from the group consisting of a pattern of stripes, a honeycomb pattern, a grid pattern, and a labyrinth pattern. 18. Method as claimed in any one of the claims 12-17, further comprising contacting the carbon or graphene layer with electrodes. 19. Method as claimed in claim 18, further comprising connecting a power cord to the electrodes.
